evidence.test_command: python -m pytest tests/runtime/test_contract_bootstrap.py tests/runtime/test_run_start_artifacts.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_replay.py tests/application/test_execution_pipeline_run_ledger.py tests/application/test_execution_pipeline_protocol_run_ledger.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_policy_enforcement.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_replay_isolation.py tests/application/test_turn_tool_dispatcher_compatibility.py tests/application/test_turn_artifact_writer.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_error_codes.py tests/runtime/test_protocol_error_code_adoption.py -q && python -m pytest tests/application/test_orchestrator_epic.py -k "build_turn_context_protocol_governed_defaults or build_turn_context_uses_active_run_policy_overrides or build_turn_context_protocol_determinism_invalid_network_mode_fails_fast" -q

implemented_now: runtime contract bootstrap now emits immutable compatibility_map_snapshot with mapping metadata and snapshot hash
compatibility map validation enforces mapping determinism equals least deterministic mapped core tool determinism
dispatcher preflight fails closed when compatibility mappings are missing or violate mapping policy constraints
compatibility tool execution performs deterministic mapping translation and emits stable translation hash for identical inputs
compatibility execution writes compat_translation.json artifact entries including compat_tool_name, mapping_version, mapping_determinism, and mapped_core_tools
protocol error code registry now includes compat_mapping_missing, compat_mapping_policy_violation, and compat_parity_violation families
